task_completion.description: The agent located and selected the correct patient, Rozella Corkery.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The name 'Rozella Corkery' is visible in the patient banner, search results, or top frame of the OpenEMR interface.

task_completion.description: The agent navigated to the patient's encounter context.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The screen displays 'Encounter History', 'Current Encounter', or a specific visit date in the context menu or main pane.

task_completion.description: The agent accessed the Fee Sheet or Coding interface within the encounter.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The header 'Fee Sheet', 'Coding', or a panel allowing ICD-10 code selection is visible.

task_completion.description: The agent searched for or selected a valid COPD ICD-10 code (J44.1 or J44.9).
task_completion.visual_evidence: The code 'J44.1' or 'J44.9' is visible in a search box, dropdown menu, or selection list.

task_completion.description: The diagnosis code was successfully added to the encounter's list of codes and saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The code (J44.1 or J44.9) appears in the 'Selected Diagnoses', 'Assessment', or 'Codes' table within the Fee Sheet or Encounter summary, distinct from the search input field.

integrity.description: The agent performed actions using the OpenEMR web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the OpenEMR web application (browser view) rather than a terminal or code editor.

integrity.description: The agent did not use backend commands or SQL injection to insert data.
integrity.visual_evidence: No command line interfaces, database consoles, or URL manipulation scripts are visible.

integrity.description: The agent did not fake the result by typing text into a non-functional area.
integrity.visual_evidence: The diagnosis appears within the structured OpenEMR Fee Sheet/Encounter tables, not just typed into a 'Notes' field or external text editor.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Patient Name: Rozella Corkery. Valid ICD-10 Codes: J44.1 (COPD with acute exacerbation) or J44.9 (COPD, unspecified).
